results.title: AI music generator Suno breach affects 55M users, per... | TechCrunch
results.snippet: After publication, Suno spokesperson Rachel Racusen did not dispute the number of users affected, and confirmed that the company experienced a security incident in November 2025. It’s not clear why the company has not yet publicly acknowledged the data breach on its website.

results.title: Iran's IRGC claims attack on Amazon's main data hub in... | Euronews
results.snippet: The IRGC claimed its cruise missiles destroyed Amazon's central data infrastructure in Bahrain and hit US air defence systems. Bahraini, US and Amazon officials have not responded.

results.title: Using DeepSeek? Here's why your privacy is at stake | Proton | Proton
